breach_of_agreement.reason: Agreed upon service term or agreement was broken or not properly followed

nitro_scams.reason: Used for most scams involving Discord Nitro

transfer_scams.reason: Money transfer scams such as money doubling, guaranteed gambling

exchange_scams.reason: Scams involving the exchange of funds (Ex. Crypto -> USD)

giveaway_scams.reason: User does not deliver the giveaway prize (crypto / FIAT currency rewards only)

invite_rewards_scam.reason: Scams that involve server invite rewards (crypto / FIAT currency rewards only)

impersonation.reason: Impersonation of a reputable user with intent to scam

mm_refusal.reason: User directly or indirectly refuses to use a trusted and mutual middleman for a deal (Ex. Will only use their friend)

submitting_fake_evidence.reason: User submits false statements or edited evidence to us

account_takeover.reason: User or service attempts or succeeds in stealing an account (Ex. Phishing link that grabs discord login information)

cooperation_with_scammer.reason: User is shown to be working with or aiding a known scammer or a scammer-owned service or having admin perms in their server.

alt_account_reports.reason: A previously flagged scammer or DWC user returns under a new account
